words.def: a flight of stairs or a flight of steps
(astronomy) a celestial body of hot gases that radiates energy derived from thermonuclear reactions in the interior
words.zh: n. 星, 恆星, 星形物, 運氣, 明星

words.def: the products of human creativity; works of art collectively
words.zh: n. 藝術, 人文科學, 技術, 巧妙, 詭計, 美術

words.def: the branch of engineering that deals with the use of computers and telecommunications to retrieve and store and transmit information
a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of
words.zh: n. 空氣, 旋律, 態度
